reviews.comment:
El playero muy amable, las instalaciones son buenas, la cocina ya había cerrado y no tiene alternativas para comer algo, me he alojado muchas veces en ell motel y es una muy buena opción para ello, pero creo que se está condenando el lugar a depender de la llegada de los socios, en los tiempos que corren el servicio gastronómico y todas esas prestaciones conexas hacen al éxito o fracaso del negocio.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant was very friendly, the facilities are good, the kitchen had already closed and there are no alternatives for eating something. I have stayed at the motel many times and it is a very good option for that, but I think the place is being condemned to depend on the arrival of members. In these times, the food service and all those related services make the success or failure of the business.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcmNqcWt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Muy sucios los baños, soy socio del ACA, y esta YPF lo pertenece. Debe mejorar la atención y servicios para todo el mundo, y sus socios que abogamos una cuota ALTA

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. The restrooms are filthy. I'm an ACA member, and this YPF station belongs to the ACA. They need to improve their service for everyone, especially for members who pay high dues.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHaGU3ZXFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ayer viernes nos olvidamos la tapa del termo en el despacho de agua... Excelente atención...
Llamamos desde la ruta, cuando nos dimos cuenta, y nos lo guardan para el lunes cuando pegamos la vuelta.... GRACIAS!

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, Friday, we forgot the lid of our thermos at the water station... Excellent service... We called from the highway as soon as we realized, and they're keeping it for us until Monday when we head back... THANK YOU!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHX0lTUm9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno todo solo q previaje no entregan factura solo tiket no se puede hacer el reintegro

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, except that Previaje doesn't provide an invoice, only a ticket, so a refund isn't possible.
